hero.title: The Global Islamic Marketing Conference
hero.subtitle: Where Islamic values meet contemporary marketing. For academics, practitioners, and policymakers shaping the halal economy and ethical business worldwide.
hero.venue: Asia Beach Resort & Spa · Alanya, Turkey

themes.title: Where Islamic values shape the modern economy
themes.subtitle: GIMAC 17 puts a special spotlight on AI, digital transformation, and women-led entrepreneurship — alongside the established tracks of Islamic marketing, finance, and comparative studies.

fees.title: Two formats. Two price tiers.
fees.subtitle: Hybrid: in-person at Asia Beach Resort or live online.
fees.earlyBird: Save 30% with early bird registration before 1 October 2026.

past.title: From Dubai 2011 to Alanya 2026
past.subtitle: Sixteen prior editions across the Gulf, North Africa, the Levant, Türkiye, the Caucasus, and Southeast Asia.

committee.title: Chaired by leading scholars across 12+ countries
committee.subtitle: GIMAC is curated by senior academics in Islamic marketing, halal economy, and ethical business — backed by IIMA and partner universities.

finalCta.title: Ready to contribute to the next edition?
finalCta.subtitle: Email your paper to the conference chair, or reach out on WhatsApp for fast questions.

footer.about: GIMAC is the annual Global Islamic Marketing Conference, running since 2011. Organized in partnership with the International Islamic Marketing Association (IIMA), Alanya Alaaddin Keykubat University, Jadara University, and Al-Quds Open University.

submitPage.title: Submit your paper to GIMAC 17
submitPage.subtitle: We welcome original, unpublished research across all GIMAC tracks. Papers may be submitted in English or Arabic.
steps: Prepare your full paper or extended abstract following the format guidelines below.
Send it as a PDF or Word attachment to the conference chair.
Use the subject line: GIMAC 17 — Paper Submission.
In the email body, include your name, affiliation, country, and preferred research track.

format.label: Blind review
format.value: Remove all author-identifying information from the manuscript

submitPage.whatsappCta: Have a question? Chat on WhatsApp

publicationsPage.title: 8 indexed publication outlets
publicationsPage.subtitle: Accepted papers are considered for publication across Springer, Emerald, Inderscience, and IIMA-hosted journals — all peer-reviewed and indexed.
publicationsPage.note: The conference scientific committee reviews all submitted papers. Strong papers accepted for presentation are invited to submit to one of the eight partner outlets for further peer review and potential publication.

committeePage.title: Scholars from 12+ countries
committeePage.subtitle: GIMAC 17 is organized by a volunteer committee of senior academics in Islamic marketing, halal economy, and ethical business — coordinated through the International Islamic Marketing Association (IIMA).

venuePage.title: Asia Beach Resort & Spa, Alanya
venuePage.subtitle: GIMAC 17 takes place along the Mediterranean coast of Türkiye — a city that blends Seljuk and Ottoman heritage with modern resort infrastructure.
venuePage.venueDesc: Asia Beach Resort & Spa is a premium property on Alanya's Cleopatra Beach, offering fully equipped conference halls, meeting rooms, and all-inclusive hospitality for academic events.
venuePage.hybridDesc: GIMAC 17 is a hybrid event. Online attendees receive a live-stream link and access to the virtual Q&A room. The online fee is $150 (all categories). Registration details are sent by email after payment.

pastPage.title: From Dubai 2011 to Alanya 2026
pastPage.subtitle: Sixteen editions across 9 countries and 3 continents — a 15-year journey of Islamic marketing scholarship.

galleryPage.title: History & Highlights Gallery
galleryPage.subtitle: Fifteen years of scholarship, community, and discovery — captured across 16 editions from Dubai to Alanya.
galleryPage.attribution: Photos from the official GIMAC Flickr archive · All rights reserved

items.quote: GIMAC connected me with scholars I had only read in journals. The quality of discourse on Islamic marketing is unmatched at any other conference I have attended.
items.name: Dr. Fatima Al-Rashidi

items.quote: My paper from GIMAC 14 was published in an Emerald indexed journal within six months. The editorial pathway the conference provides is a genuine differentiator.
items.name: Prof. Musa Idris

items.quote: The hybrid format made it easy to participate from Casablanca without the travel cost. The online Q&A sessions were fully interactive and well organised.
items.name: Dr. Layla Benali

items.quote: Presenting at GIMAC was a turning point in my PhD journey. The feedback from the scientific committee helped me sharpen my theoretical framework significantly.
items.name: Amira Youssef

items.quote: I have attended six GIMAC editions and the consistency of academic rigour combined with genuine warmth in the Islamic scholarly community keeps bringing me back.
items.name: Prof. Tariq Hassan

items.quote: The special focus track on AI and Islamic business ethics opened conversations I never expected at a marketing conference. Groundbreaking and timely.
items.name: Dr. Nadia Khoury

items.quote: GIMAC gave my research on halal tourism a platform with real critical engagement. The reviewers' comments were substantive and pushed my work forward.
items.name: Dr. Omar Saleh

items.a: GIMAC 17 welcomes submissions from academics, PhD candidates, practitioners, and policymakers working in Islamic marketing, halal economy, Islamic finance, ethical business, and related fields. Co-authored papers are accepted.

Yes. GIMAC 17 accepts full papers and extended abstracts in both English and Arabic. The review process for Arabic-language submissions is handled by Arabic-speaking members of the scientific committee.

items.q: What happens after my paper is accepted?
items.a: Accepted papers are invited for presentation at the conference. Strong papers are then recommended by the scientific committee for submission to one of eight partner publication outlets, including Springer and Emerald indexed journals.
Yes. GIMAC 17 is a hybrid event. Online participants receive a live-stream link and access to the virtual Q&A room. The online registration fee is $150 for all categories.

items.q: What is the early bird discount?
items.a: Registrations completed before 1 October 2026 receive a 30% discount on the standard fee. Fees can be paid via PayPal. A confirmation email is sent after payment is verified.
The conference takes place at Asia Beach Resort & Spa on Cleopatra Beach, Alanya, Türkiye. The nearest airport is Gazipaşa–Alanya (GZP), approximately 45 minutes away by transfer.
